sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48653" key="qhlukw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θηλῠκώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n48653.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of effeminate nature</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:265" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">265</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
